archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Retro-Futurism (Terminal) variant

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Control Room Grid. No floating cards; utilize grid borders for a structured, technical appearance.

grid.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-1 md:gap-px bg-slate-800 border border-slate-800

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense functional content. Center-align dropzone areas and code displays.

surfaces_and_borders.style: Retro-Futurism / Terminal Look with Technical Grid Borders
surfaces_and_borders.cards: rounded-none border border-slate-800 bg-slate-950 shadow-none hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-colors
surfaces_and_borders.inputs: rounded-none border-b border-slate-700 bg-transparent px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 focus:border-cyan-400 transition-colors
surfaces_and_borders.buttons: rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-mono text-sm tracking-widest uppercase transition-all

components.navigation: Sticky top nav with crystal glassmorphism (bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-800). Include logo with monospace font and a pulsing yellow dot for 'Active Sessions'.
components.upload_dropzone: Large central dashed border area (border-dashed border-2 border-slate-700 hover:border-cyan-400 hover:bg-cyan-400/5). Include lucide-react upload icon.
components.code_display: Massive typography (text-6xl md:text-8xl font-mono text-cyan-400). Add a subtle text-shadow or drop-shadow for a glowing effect.
components.code_input: 6 individual 1-character text inputs with massive monospace text, center-aligned, bottom border only. Auto-focus next input.
components.status_indicators: Small monospace labels with blinking cursor/dots. e.g., '[WAITING FOR RECEIVER...]', '[TRANSFERRING]', '[COMPLETE]'. Colored text based on status.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard cuts on color changes or fast transitions (150ms) to fit the technical vibe.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: ASCII or bracket-based loaders (e.g., [==  ] ) instead of standard circular spinners, or technical linear progress bars.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.code_reveal: Scramble effect or rapid number cycling before revealing the final 6-digit code.

icons_and_assets.style: Technical, sharp, minimal. Use 1.5px stroke width.

secure_bg.description: Dark abstract technical background with subtle glowing data streams. Use as an ambient fixed background with low opacity (e.g., opacity-10 or mix-blend-screen) behind the main grid.

cyber_padlock.description: A glowing 3D holographic padlock over a dark metallic surface. Use as an accent image in the 'About Security' section or as a visual flair in the receive panel when waiting for a code.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on slate-950 meets APCA standards. Highlight colors must remain readable.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'upload-file-dropzone', 'code-input-field-1', 'download-udef-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML elements styled with Tailwind for the grid and structural layouts instead of Shadcn Cards to achieve the 'Control Room' / Technical look.
Apply 'font-mono' specifically to data points, session counters, statuses, and codes.
Install the required font families from Google Fonts (Outfit, Inter, JetBrains Mono) and map them in tailwind.config.js.
Include lucide-react and framer-motion as dependencies.
The 6-digit code display should be the highest-contrast, most prominent element on the screen when active.
Never use generic rounded borders (rounded-md/lg); enforce 'rounded-none' to maintain the strict Brutalist/Technical aesthetic.
Implement a marquee or scrolling console log for the 'Active Sessions Counter' or system logs to amplify the terminal feel.
